title: ghcup bootstrap vars
description: ghcup bootstrap variables. OS Compatibility: All. Haskell toolchain installer.

BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_NONINTERACTIVE.description: Set to 1 to install ghcup silently without prompts. Default is 1 in this bootstrap.

BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_MINIMAL.description: Set to 1 to install only ghcup (no GHC, cabal, etc. by default). Default is 1.

BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_INSTALL_HLS.description: Set to 1 to also install Haskell Language Server.

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
